name: should use scoring_format_player_seasonlogs as FROM table when sorting by fantasy points from seasonlogs with year splits
description: Tests from-table optimization for scoring format columns with year splits - query should start from scoring_format_player_seasonlogs table with scoring_format_id in WHERE clause
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."points" AS "points_from_seasonlogs_0", "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."year", "player"."pos" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."pid" where "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' group by player.fname, player.lname, "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."points", "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."year", "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "tf0d891b1f69e0b8ee39a5cf4baa48016"."pid" asc limit 500
